name: is.zori.entities.physics2d
description: DOTS 2D physics: built-in Rigidbody2D/Collider2D authoring baked to ECS, stepped over the low-level Unity.U2D.Physics (Box2D) batch surface, with each body's pose written into Unity.Transforms.LocalToWorld. Renderer-agnostic.

samples.description: The complete custom PhysicsBody2D/PhysicsShape2D authoring surface with a 2D-native scene-view editor: an authored sample scene demonstrating the five shape kinds, a material template with a per-field override, a filtered pair, and a static floor; plus the low-level direct/bulk creation path (CreateBodyBatch). Renderer-agnostic — no Entities.Graphics dependency.
